"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const yargs = require("yargs"); const routerGenerator = require("@tanstack/router-generator"); const generate = require("./generate.cjs"); const watch = require("./watch.cjs"); function _interopNamespaceDefault(e) { const n = Object.create(null, { [Symbol.toStringTag]: { value: "Module" } }); if (e) { for (const k in e) { if (k !== "default") { const d = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(e, k); Object.defineProperty(n, k, d.get ? d : { enumerable: true, get: () => e[k] }); } } } n.default = e; return Object.freeze(n); } const yargs__namespace = /* @__PURE__ */ _interopNamespaceDefault(yargs); main(); function main() { yargs__namespace.scriptName("tsr").usage("$0 <cmd> [args]").command("generate", "Generate the routes for a project", async () => { const config = routerGenerator.getConfig(); await generate.generate(config, process.cwd()); }).command( "watch", "Continuously watch and generate the routes for a project", () => { watch.watch(process.cwd()); } ).help().argv; } exports.main = main; //# sourceMappingURL=index.cjs.map
